growth_records.lvlwhy: the source paper (often a review/modeling reuse) states no strain

up.method: maximum biomass-specific CO uptake rate (kinetic parameter), cited from Vega et al. (1989)

growth_records.cite: Kerkhof et al. Understanding microbial syngas fermentation rates. Appl Microbiol Biotechnol (2024). DOI:10.1007/s00253-024-13364-3. [PMC11662053]
growth_records.snippet: Table 3: Peptostreptococcus productus qCO,max=-144 mmol/(gx.h), Ks,CO=0.016 mmol/L, KI,CO=>12 mmol/L; Source Vega et al. (1989).
growth_records.notes: qCO,max (maximum specific CO uptake) = -144 mmol_CO/(gx.h); Ks,CO=0.016 mmol_CO/L; KI,CO=>12 mmol_CO/L. Cited FROM Vega et al. (1989) (review Table 3). C. aceticum value recalculated from qAcT,max via Eq.3 (Table 3 footnote a). Culture conditions (T, pH, medium, mode) not restated in this review.
